name: snappy-frame-mobile
description: Capacitor wrapper for Snappy Frame (iOS/Android). The web app is copied into www/ and bundled into the native app.

scripts.copy-web: rm -rf www && mkdir -p www && cp -r ../index.html ../vendor ../manifest.webmanifest ../sw.js ../icon-192.png ../icon-512.png ../icon-512-maskable.png ../apple-touch-icon.png www/
scripts.sync: npm run copy-web && npx cap sync
